MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THANH LY's Motion For Attorneys' Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THANH LY's Motion For Attorneys' Fees is off calendar per the request of the moving party via the correspondence received 1/9/2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
